name: vscode-qq-copilot-connector
description: VS Code QQ connector with QQBot MCP tools, Copilot integration, and an optional local QQ backend mode.

ncat.backendMode.description: Backend mode. 'ncat' uses the local OneBot-compatible backend, 'qqbot' uses the official QQ Bot API. Reload window after changing this value.

ncat.wsUrl.description: Local OneBot-compatible backend WebSocket server URL.

ncat.rootDir.description: Local backend root directory. Supports absolute path or workspace-relative path.

ncat.quickLoginUin.description: Optional QQ UIN for quick login on Windows. If set, extension starts NapCatWinBootMain.exe <uin> first.

ncat.tokenFile.description: Optional token file path. If set, token auto-read tries this file first.

ncat.tokenEnvVar.description: Environment variable name used when ncat.token is empty.

ncat.qqbotAppId.description: QQBot official AppID used in qqbot backend mode.

ncat.qqbotClientSecret.description: QQBot official ClientSecret used in qqbot backend mode.

ncat.qqbotBotName.description: Display name shown in the sidebar when using qqbot backend mode.

ncat.qqbotMarkdownSupport.description: Enable official QQBot markdown message mode for text sending.

ncat.qqbotPrimaryChatType.description: Default QQBot conversation type used by MCP send tools when no targetId is provided.

ncat.qqbotPrimaryChatId.description: Default QQBot targetId used by MCP send tools when no targetId is provided.

ncat.qqbotAutoReply.description: Automatically send AI replies for incoming QQBot messages.

ncat.qqbotUseTools.description: Allow the language model to use available VS Code/MCP tools when auto-replying in qqbot mode.

ncat.qqbotModelVendor.description: Preferred language model vendor for qqbot auto-reply. Leave empty to use any available model.

ncat.qqbotModelFamily.description: Optional preferred language model family for qqbot auto-reply.

ncat.qqbotSystemPrompt.default: 你是在 VS Code 中运行的 QQBot 助手。回答要直接、简洁、准确。必要时可以调用可用工具。
ncat.qqbotSystemPrompt.description: System prompt prefix used for qqbot auto-reply.

ncat.qqbotMaxToolRounds.description: Maximum number of tool-calling rounds per qqbot auto-reply request.

ncat.autoConnect.description: Auto connect when VS Code starts.

ncat.maxMessagesPerChat.description: Maximum number of cached messages for each chat in sidebar.
